hero_subtitle: Because every moment deserves an unforgettable experience.
about_app_sub: Where the most beautiful moments begin
about_app_para: We believe distinctive properties deserve the best presentation. That's why we built a platform that pairs premium presentation with a refined booking experience.
for_hosts_title: Get your place in front of more guests.
host_f1_desc: Our team helps you shoot your property, write the right copy, and present it with a modern, luxurious feel.
host_f2_desc: Customer service around the clock, supporting services for your place, and ongoing improvement ideas.
host_f3_desc: We hand-pick properties carefully and back up guests with the right services.
for_guests_title: Because your moments deserve the best.
guest_f1_desc: We pick chalets and resthouses against strict criteria so the experience always matches your expectations.
guest_f2_desc: A reliable, clear booking flow that gets you to the right place smoothly and effortlessly.
guest_f3_desc: We care about the details that make the difference — from the quality of presentation to your stay inside the property.
step_phone_sub: We'll use this to contact you about your listing.
step_type_title: What kind of place is it?
step_type_sub: Pick the option that best describes your property.
step_basics_sub: A short title, a description, and the max number of guests.
step_location_sub: Paste a Google Maps link to the exact location.
maps_url_hint: Open Google Maps → tap the location → Share → Copy link, then paste it here.
description_placeholder: Describe the place, the vibe, what makes it special…
guests_sub: The largest group this place can host.
step_facilities_sub: Choose what's on the property. Tap a chip to add it.
step_images_sub: Photos help guests fall in love before they book.
extra_photos_sub: Anything else you'd like to show: views, the entrance, the night sky.
share_link: Share this link to preview your listing.
photos_required_per_facility: At least one photo is required for each facility.
missing_photos_alert: Add at least one photo for each facility before continuing.
brand_meta_description: At Calm, we believe distinctive properties deserve the best presentation, so we built a platform that pairs premium presentation with a refined booking experience.
showcase_title: An app made for unforgettable stays.
showcase_sub: Discover hand-picked luxury chalets, resthouses, camps and farms across Saudi — each one curated for comfort.
feature_1_desc: Every property is reviewed for quality, design and the little details that matter.
feature_2_desc: See every room, amenity and photo before you book — no surprises, ever.
feature_3_desc: Reach the host directly on WhatsApp. Ask anything, book on your terms.
footer_about: Calm is a curated stays platform for Saudi — luxury chalets, resthouses, camps and farms.
